data.title: Galaxy Digital Reports Annual Loss Amid Digital Asset Challenges
data.description:
Galaxy Digital has released its annual report, revealing a net loss of approximately $241 million for the year. According to Odaily, the loss was primarily due to unrealized losses in digital assets and investment positions.

The adjusted figures indicate that the company achieved an EBITDA of around $216 million, with its core operations showing profitability under non-GAAP measures. The digital asset business, which includes trading, lending, asset management, and staking services, reported an adjusted gross profit of about $505 million. Following the release of the financial report, the company's stock price increased by over 11%.

data.title: Taylor Swift's Wedding Odds Drop Amid New Reports
data.description:
The probability of Taylor Swift getting married by the end of June has decreased to 19%, according to Odaily, marking a 45% drop in the past 24 hours.

Earlier rumors suggested that Swift and Travis Kelce might wed on June 13 in Rhode Island. However, a recent report from Page Six indicates that the wedding is now set for July 3 in New York, with invitations already sent out. Page Six also notes that Swift owns property in New York's Tribeca neighborhood and has a fondness for celebrating U.S. Independence Day on July 4, having hosted grand events on this date in the past.

data.title: Covenant AI announced its withdrawal from the Bittensor network, raising questions about its centralized governance.
data.description: Covenant AI has announced its withdrawal from the Bittensor network, raising questions about its governance structure. The company stated that while Bittensor claims to be decentralized, actual governance remains concentrated in the hands of a few, with decisions lacking transparency and community consensus. Covenant AI claims that its subnet operations have recently encountered measures including suspension of revenue distribution, adjustments to community management permissions, and infrastructure changes, which it considers inconsistent with decentralized principles. The team stated that it will continue to advance decentralized AI training and conduct further research and development in other environments. Covenant AI was previously a well-known subnet project within the Bittensor ecosystem (formerly known as Templar). In the past few months, it completed the training of the Covenant-72B model, a model with 72 billion parameters, pre-trained by over 70 independent contributors on general-purpose hardware. It is considered one of the largest decentralized LLM pre-training practices to date and has received public recognition from the CEO of Nvidia and the co-founder of Anthropic. The team reiterated its commitment to continuing decentralized AI training and conducting further research in other environments.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 72,000 USDT with a 1.86% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 10, 2026, 00:52 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 72,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 72,000 USDT, with a narrowed 1.86% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Criticizes Iran's Handling of Strait of Hormuz Oil Passage
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has expressed dissatisfaction with Iran's management of oil transit through the Strait of Hormuz. According to NS3.AI, Trump stated that Iran's actions are not in line with an agreement he claims was established. The Strait of Hormuz is a critical chokepoint for global oil shipments, and any disruptions can have significant implications for international markets.

data.title: AI TRENDS | U.S. Officials Convene Wall Street Leaders Over AI Cybersecurity Concerns
data.description:
U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell have called an urgent meeting with Wall Street leaders to address concerns about the potential cybersecurity risks posed by the latest AI model from Anthropic. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the growing apprehension among financial regulators regarding the implications of advanced AI technologies on the security of financial systems.

The meeting underscores the increasing focus on AI's role in cybersecurity, as financial institutions grapple with the challenges of integrating cutting-edge technologies while safeguarding sensitive data. The Anthropic AI model, known for its advanced capabilities, has raised alarms about its potential misuse in cyberattacks, prompting federal officials to seek input from industry leaders on mitigating these risks.

This development comes amid a broader dialogue on the balance between technological innovation and security, as AI continues to transform various sectors. The discussions are expected to explore strategies for enhancing cybersecurity measures and ensuring that AI advancements do not compromise the integrity of financial systems.

data.title: XRP Spot ETF Experiences Significant Outflow
data.description:
According to Odaily, data from SoSoValue indicates that on April 9, Eastern Time, the XRP spot ETF saw a net outflow of $661,200. The 21Shares XRP ETF (TOXR) was the only fund to experience this outflow, contributing to a historical total net outflow of $25.845 million.

As of the time of reporting, the total net asset value of the XRP spot ETF stands at $955 million, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.15%. The historical cumulative net inflow has reached $1.21 billion.

data.title: Asian Development Bank Forecasts Economic Slowdown Amid Middle East Tensions
data.description: The Asian Development Bank (ADB) released its "2026 Asian Development Outlook" report on April 10, highlighting increased geopolitical risks due to conflicts in the Middle East. According to Jin10, the report indicates that developing economies in the Asia-Pacific region are facing growing economic downturn risks. The ADB forecasts that if the Middle East situation stabilizes early, the economic growth rate for these economies will slow from 5.4% in 2025 to 5.1% in both 2026 and 2027. Inflation is expected to rise from 3.0% in 2025 to 3.6% in 2026 and 3.4% in 2027. However, if the turmoil in the Middle East persists until the third quarter of this year, the economic growth rate for the Asia-Pacific developing economies could slow further to 4.7% in 2026 and 4.8% in 2027, with inflation rising to 5.6% in 2026.

data.title: AI TRENDS | SpaceX Reports Nearly $5 Billion Loss Due to AI-Related Expenses
data.description: SpaceX reported a significant financial loss last year, amounting to nearly $5 billion, primarily due to expenditures related to artificial intelligence. According to Jin10, the company's investment in AI technologies contributed substantially to this deficit. The report highlights the growing financial impact of AI development on major corporations, as they increasingly allocate resources to advance their technological capabilities. This trend underscores the importance of AI in shaping the future of industries, despite the immediate financial challenges it may pose.

data.title: The US XRP spot ETF saw a net outflow of $661,200 in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the XRP spot ETF saw a total net outflow of $661,200 yesterday (April 9th, Eastern Time). Only the 21Shares XRP ETF (TOXR) experienced a net outflow yesterday, with a single-day net outflow of $661,200, bringing its total historical net outflow to -$25.845 million. As of press time, the XRP spot ETF has a total net asset value of $955 million, an XRP net asset ratio of 1.15%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $1.21 billion.

data.title: Anthropic is exploring the possibility of designing its own chips, but the project is still in its early stages.
data.description: Three sources revealed that Anthropic is exploring the possibility of designing its own chips. This plan is still in its early stages, and Anthropic may ultimately decide to only purchase AI chips instead of designing them itself. Another source indicated that Anthropic has not yet finalized a specific design or assembled a dedicated team for the project.

data.title: WLFI plans to submit a proposal to unlock early tokens next week, responding to lending concerns by stating there is no risk of liquidation.
data.description: WLFI officially responded to market concerns regarding its lending positions on WLFI Markets, stating that there is currently no risk of liquidation and that even significant market volatility can be mitigated by adding collateral. It stated that as one of the platform's main borrowers, its lending activities are providing a source of revenue for the platform, thereby increasing stablecoin yields. In terms of data, WLFI disclosed that USD1 currently generates approximately $159.5 million in annualized revenue, and has repurchased approximately 435 million WLFI on the secondary market over the past six months, totaling approximately $65.58 million. The project also stated that it will submit a governance proposal next week to discuss unlocking early-locked tokens and upgrading USD1's functionality, including supporting gas-free transfers and adapting to AI payment infrastructure.

data.title: Sources say Iran will not negotiate with the United States until a ceasefire is achieved in Lebanon.
data.description: Sources say Iran has informed Pakistan, the mediator in the negotiations, that its delegation will not participate in peace talks with the United States until a ceasefire is achieved in Lebanon. (CCTV News)
